G

generateAmortizationTable(double, double, int) - Method in interface com.fincredit.interfaces.ILoanable
 
generateAmortizationTable(double, double, int) - Method in class com.fincredit.model.LoanProduct
Method to generate an amortization table for a loan, which provides a breakdown of each payment over the life of the loan, including the interest portion, capital payment, and remaining balance after each payment.

getBaseRate() - Method in class com.fincredit.model.MortgageLoan
Method to get the base interest rate for the mortgage loan product, returning a fixed value of 7.5%.

getCreditScore() - Method in class com.fincredit.model.Client
Method to calculate the client's credit score based on the ratio of net income to monthly income, with predefined thresholds for different score categories.

getSummary() - Method in class com.fincredit.model.Client
Method to get a summary of the client's financial status, including role, income, net income, payment capacity, credit score, and number of associated loans.
